value.0: The drow are an evil subrace of elves, living deep underground in the dangerous Underdark.

This amulet originates in the city of Sigil where is was forged the by the Society of Sensation. It was given out to the most loyal sensates, to protect them when they traveled the Planes looking for new experiences.

Like many evil items, these robes are fashioned in great numbers by the Zhentarim and their minions. They are found far and wide across the Realms, and the more hands they touch, the more influence the Zhents enjoy.

Not your standard container, a phylactery contains the essence, or soul, of a creature that has moved itself into the realm of undead immortality.
A group of skulls and small bones, gathered together over a fine layer of dust on the floor.  Something seems to gleam dimmly in their midst...
